title: Ventas Announces Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Date and Conference Call
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) will issue its second quarter 2023 earnings release after the close of trading on the New York Stock Exchange on Thursday, August 3, 2023. A conference call to discuss those earnings will be held on Friday, August 4, 2023, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time (9:00 a.m. Central Time). The dial-in number for the conference call is (888) 330-3576 (or +1 (646) 960-0672 for international callers), and the participant passcode is 7.
